body:
🔴 **Tool Issue** — `CHANGELOG.md:4`
`Compared with version 6.1.0`
The last **released** version on `main` is `6.1.1` (2025-08-21), not `6.1.0`. The comparison base should be `6.1.1`.
**Fix:** Update `CHANGELOG.md` to compare with `6.1.1`, and report the issue in the [generation tool repository](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.typescript/issues).

1 tool issue found. No API design issues found.

- **CHANGELOG comparison base** (1): `CHANGELOG.md` says "Compared with version 6.1.0" but the last released version on `main` is `6.1.1` (2025-08-21). This appears to be a tool bug where the generator skipped the `6.1.1` entry.

<details>
<summary>📊 Structured Report</summary>

```json
{"agent":"mgmt-reviewer","pr":38148,"summary":"issues_found","findings":[{"file":"sdk/trafficmanager/arm-trafficmanager/CHANGELOG.md","line":4,"issueType":"tool","category":"changelog-comparison-base","description":"Compared with version 6.1.0 but last released version is 6.1.1 (2025-08-21); generator skipped 6.1.1 as comparison base"}]}
```

</details>

## Next Steps to Merge
Only failed checks and required actions are listed below.

- ❌ **UnitTest (ubuntu_22x_node / windows_20x_node / macoslatest_24x_node / windows_20x_browser)**: Stale test recordings — tests request `api-version=2024-04-01-preview` but recordings were made with `api-version=2022-04-01`. Action: Re-record tests per the [test guide](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/blob/main/documentation/Quickstart-on-how-to-write-tests.md#run-tests-in-record-mode), or skip tests with maintainer approval. Review [ADO logs](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/29ec6040-b234-4e31-b139-33dc4287b756/_build/results?buildId=6156548).
